abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3129f4caa4754caf]{Take Decisive Action} when in a Bad Spot, envision how your vows give you strength in this moment. You may reroll one challenge die.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} by telling a hard truth, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit. On a weak hit or miss, envision how this truth complicates your current situation.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} and score a miss, you may reroll one challenge die. If you score a miss again, reduce your maximum spirit by 1. You may recover this lost spirit when you next @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} and score a strong hit.
